name: Curry Barbeque Sauce #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and onions, and sauté until light golden brown.
3. Stir in curry powder, milk, and chopped apples. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Gradually add beef stock while continuing to simmer. Cook for an additional half hour, adding more stock if the sauce becomes too thick.
5. Brush the sauce onto kebabs before grilling or serving.
